subcodes.first_line: We have illumined Our loved ones with the effulgent rays of the Luminary of love and set them ablaze with the fire of the blessed Tree [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دوستانرا بتجلیات انوار نیر محبت منور نمودیم و بنار سدره مبارکه مشتعل ساختیم
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for nearness to God
